notes: Package can be consumed as a validated spec pack for JIT materialization.
Runtime strategy remains specification-based until a retained implementation is separately promoted.
Rollback is to disable or demote the package and route platform operations work to the orchestrator or human review.

required_task_metadata: work type: incident, access-readiness, change-readiness, integration-risk, exception, client delivery, content workflow, or completion evidence
tenant, business unit, product, client, subscriber, account, platform, workspace, environment, jurisdiction, and engagement scope
affected systems, interfaces, owners, approvals, systems of record, evidence artifacts, lifecycle state, and target output shape
runtime_assumptions_to_retrieve: tenant policies, operating constraints, escalation thresholds, quality standards, confidentiality rules, approval matrix, and rollback expectations
current systems of record, record locations, log retention, retrieval hooks, access owner, change owner, incident owner, content owner, and client delivery owner
client commitments, contract boundaries, approved recipients, approved delivery channels, data-use constraints, content approval rules, and status communication rules
regulated_lane_caveats: Platform operations may identify legal, privacy, editorial, security, copyright, contractual, or attestation triggers but must not interpret or approve them.
Access and change readiness support does not authorize access grants, security exceptions, production code changes, or engineering release approval.
Subscriber data, client files, operational logs, platform credentials, unpublished content, performance records, and engagement evidence require tenant-approved confidentiality handling.
orchestrator_return_conditions: required tenant facts, records, approvals, source context, or retrieval hooks are missing and would change the answer
public sources, tenant policy, vendor policy, contract terms, security controls, privacy obligations, content workflow rules, or client instructions materially conflict
the request requires legal, editorial, security, engineering, privacy, financial, contractual, attestation, executive, or final client authority

notes: Structured evidence supports the issue #1477 validated claim.
Lifecycle state transitions are evidence-gated and reversible when evidence fails.
No retained implementation is claimed by this package.
